summary: Completed testing of Loop Analytics instrumentation for Recap→Hero→Action→Reinforcement loop. All 9 backend API tests passed (POST /api/analytics/events batch ingest, GET /api/analytics/loop-metrics aggregation, auth tests). Frontend verification confirmed all analytics events are being tracked: hero_viewed, hero_expanded_why, hero_action_clicked, recap_teaser_viewed, recap_opened, recap_section_viewed, recap_priority_clicked. Verified loop-metrics returns correct structure with hero_view_count, hero_click_rate, why_expand_rate, priority_source_breakdown, completions_by_source.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: POST /api/analytics/events batch ingest works - returns {ingested: N}
PASS: POST /api/analytics/events with empty array returns {ingested: 0}
PASS: Auth protection works - 401 returned for unauthenticated requests
PASS: Frontend trackEvent() with 5s batching works correctly
PASS: hero_viewed tracked on pipeline hero card view
PASS: hero_expanded_why tracked when 'Why this?' button clicked
PASS: hero_action_clicked tracked when CTA button clicked
PASS: recap_teaser_viewed tracked on RecapTeaser mount
PASS: recap_opened tracked when /recap page loads
PASS: recap_priority_clicked tracked on momentum/priority item clicks
PASS: No JavaScript console errors on /pipeline or /recap pages
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Emma Chen athlete account with 5 programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loop Analytics system fully operational. Events stored in 'loop_analytics' MongoDB collection. Frontend batches events every 5 seconds via analytics.js. Backend aggregates metrics via /api/analytics/loop-metrics endpoint. All event types tracked: hero_viewed, hero_expanded_why, hero_action_clicked, reinforcement_shown, recap_teaser_viewed, recap_opened, recap_section_viewed, recap_priority_clicked.
